moments.title: Longest Day: Summer Solstice
moments.blurb: Today marks the Summer Solstice in the Northern Hemisphere, bringing the longest day and shortest night of the year, with sunrise at Stonehenge aligning at approximately 4:52 AM.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Rise and shine! It's the Summer Solstice, the longest day of 2026. Make the most of every extra minute of daylight.

angles.name: Stonehenge Sunrise
angles.copy: Did you catch the sunrise at Stonehenge? Thousands gathered to see the sun align perfectly on the Summer Solstice. What a sight!

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Officially astronomical summer! Today's the Summer Solstice, so let the long evenings, BBQs, and good times roll.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing, hosted across 16 cities in the USA, Canada, and Mexico, featuring 48 teams in an expanded format.

angles.name: World Cup Buzz
angles.copy: It's all about the World Cup! With matches happening daily, who are you backing to go all the way in the expanded 48-team tournament?

angles.name: Game On
angles.copy: Another day, more World Cup action! Catch up on the latest results and look ahead to today's big games. Who's impressed you most so far?

angles.name: North American Hosts
angles.copy: The 2026 World Cup is making history, co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico. How are you enjoying the North American vibe?

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday Lana Del Rey
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic music, celebrates her 41st birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Queen
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey! What's your favourite track from the queen of melancholic pop?

angles.name: Lana Vibes
angles.copy: Celebrating Lana Del Rey's birthday today! Her unique sound and storytelling have captivated us for years. Which album is on repeat for you?

moments.title: Lexus Eastbourne Open Underway
moments.blurb: The Lexus Eastbourne International tennis tournament is currently taking place at Devonshire Park, running from June 20-27, 2026.

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: The grass court season is heating up! The Lexus Eastbourne Open is live right now, building excitement for Wimbledon. Who are you watching?

angles.name: Tennis in the South
angles.copy: Catching all the action from the Lexus Eastbourne International! Great to have top-tier tennis right here in the South this week.

moments.title: The Agency Season 2 Premieres
moments.blurb: The second season of the political thriller 'The Agency' starring Michael Fassbender drops today on Paramount+, pulling viewers deeper into the world of espionage.

angles.name: Espionage Thrills
angles.copy: Ready for more high-stakes espionage? 'The Agency' Season 2 is out today on Paramount+! What are your predictions for the new series?

angles.name: Fassbender Returns
angles.copy: Michael Fassbender is back as the covert CIA agent in 'The Agency' Season 2, streaming from today. Expect betrayal, moles, and chaos!

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: American pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday tomorrow, June 22.

angles.name: Tomorrow's Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Tomorrow, the legendary Cyndi Lauper turns 73. What's your all-time favourite Cyndi classic?

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: From 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' to 'True Colors', Cyndi Lauper is a pop pioneer. Wishing her a very happy 73rd birthday for tomorrow!

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Returns
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of 'House of the Dragon' begins streaming tomorrow, Monday, June 22, on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max.

angles.name: Dragons Are Back
angles.copy: Fire and Blood! 'House of the Dragon' Season 3 lands tomorrow. Are you ready for more Targaryen drama? #HOTDS3

angles.name: Winter Is Coming
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! Season 3 of 'House of the Dragon' starts tomorrow on Sky Atlantic and HBO Max. What do you hope to see unfold?

moments.title: Solange Knowles Turns 40
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, songwriter, and artist Solange Knowles will celebrate her 40th birthday on Wednesday, June 24.

angles.name: Solange's 40th
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 40th Birthday to the incredible Solange Knowles on Wednesday! What's your favourite Solange moment or song?

angles.name: Artist & Icon
angles.copy: From 'Losing You' to 'A Seat at the Table', Solange has continually pushed boundaries. Celebrate her 40th birthday this Wednesday!

moments.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2
moments.blurb: The second season of the live-action 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' series is set to premiere on Netflix this Thursday, June 25.

angles.name: New Avatar Season
angles.copy: Get ready to bend! 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' Season 2 arrives on Netflix this Thursday. Are you hyped for more adventures?

angles.name: Netflix Binge
angles.copy: Your next binge-watch is sorted! 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' Season 2 drops this Thursday. Who's watching on day one?

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, will celebrate her 33rd birthday on Friday, June 26.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ari
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The incredible Ariana Grande turns 33 this Friday. What's your ultimate Ariana anthem?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global pop sensation, Ariana Grande has dominated the charts. Wishing her a fantastic 33rd birthday this Friday!

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 on Disney+
moments.blurb: The critically acclaimed comedy-drama 'The Bear' returns for its fifth season, streaming on Disney+ from Friday, June 26.

angles.name: Yes, Chef!
angles.copy: Get ready for more kitchen chaos and culinary brilliance! 'The Bear' Season 5 drops this Friday on Disney+. Who's excited?

angles.name: Award-winning return
angles.copy: The multi-award-winning series 'The Bear' is back for its fifth season this Friday. Prepare for more intense drama and delicious food!

moments.title: Golowan Festival in Penzance
moments.blurb: Penzance's annual Golowan Festival, celebrating the summer solstice with music and dancing, is ongoing from June 19-28, 2026.

angles.name: Penzance Celebrates
angles.copy: The vibrant Golowan Festival is bringing music and dancing to Penzance this week, celebrating the summer solstice! Who's heading down?

angles.name: Cornwall Festivities
angles.copy: Cornwall is alive with the spirit of Golowan! This traditional festival runs until June 28th, with plenty of community fun.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Countdown
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Championships are just over a week away, set to begin on Monday, June 29 and run until July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Tennis Grand Slam
angles.copy: Get ready, tennis fans! Wimbledon 2026 is just around the corner, starting next Monday. Who are your early picks for the titles?

angles.name: Grass Court Glory
angles.copy: The All England Club is almost ready! Wimbledon kicks off on June 29th. We can't wait for two weeks of thrilling grass-court tennis.
